/** * Get visitor keys of a given node. * @param {object} node The AST node to get keys. * @returns {readonly string[]} Visitor keys of the node. */ export function getKeys(node: object): readonly string[]; /** * Make the union set with `KEYS` and given keys. * @param {VisitorKeys} additionalKeys The additional keys. * @returns {VisitorKeys} The union set. */ export function unionWith(additionalKeys: VisitorKeys): VisitorKeys; export { KEYS }; export type VisitorKeys = import('./visitor-keys.js').VisitorKeys; import KEYS from "./visitor-keys.js"; //# sourceMappingURL=index.d.ts.map
